phase_a.summary: All 7 ACs (1-7) have traceable test evidence. 58/58 assertions green.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Fresh `frw install --project` did not create XDG config.yaml or promotion-targets.yaml; upgrade.sh has no pre-XDG specialists migration; launch-phase.sh never consumes state.json.source_todos.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: No test for source_todos runtime consumption in launch-phase.sh; no test for pre-XDG specialists migration.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: Spec wants source_todo/source_todos mutually exclusive; both validate. Runtime path still only uses roadmap todos[].

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: upgrade.sh, promotion-targets.schema.yaml, fixtures outside plan.json ownership (cross-deliverable diff bleed).

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: validate-definition.sh uses Draft7Validator against a Draft 2020-12 schema; misses cross-field validation.

evaluator_notes.rationale: AC-6 says source_todos 'threaded end-to-end' through /furrow:next handoff. commands/next.md was updated but the script path (launch-phase.sh which renders prompts on worktree-complete) wasn't. Partially satisfies AC-6 at the command-prose level; fails at the runtime-consumption level. Merits a follow-up row.

evaluator_notes.finding: frw install fresh-bootstrap of XDG config files missing
evaluator_notes.rationale: AC-3 says promotion-targets.yaml is 'produced'; codex confirmed only `frw upgrade --apply` creates it, not `frw install`. If the user never runs upgrade, the scaffolding doesn't exist. Merits a fix in install.sh consumer-mode path.

Definition AC-6 says 'Back-compat: definitions using source_todo (singular) still validate and work.' This suggests both variants SHOULD validate (back-compat discipline), but codex reads it as 'one or the other, not both'. Spec could go either way. Current impl accepts both — conservative interpretation of back-compat.
Schema declares draft 2020-12 but validator enforces draft 7. Any Draft 2020-12-specific constructs (prefixItems, dynamicRef, etc.) would silently fail validation. Merits a fix.
The files named (upgrade.sh, schemas/promotion-targets.schema.yaml, fixtures) ARE in plan.json wave-2 config-cleanup file_ownership. Codex misread plan.json OR compared against a stale snapshot.

overall_rationale: Two real gaps (source_todos runtime consumption; fresh-install XDG bootstrap) + one real bug (Draft7 vs 2020-12) prevent clean PASS. Phase A tests pass what they cover, but what's covered doesn't include the full AC-6 runtime path or AC-3 fresh-install scenario.

action_items.item: Wire source_todos into bin/frw.d/scripts/launch-phase.sh handoff prompt rendering (AC-6 runtime path).
Extend install.sh consumer-mode path to bootstrap empty ~/.config/furrow/config.yaml and promotion-targets.yaml on first install (AC-3 fresh-install bootstrap).
Switch validate-definition.sh to a Draft 2020-12 validator (or downgrade schema $schema to draft-07).
Spec clarification: is source_todo + source_todos simultaneously a validation error, or back-compat-allowed both-are-fine?
